title: AuthorIndexEntry Collection
description: Array of AuthorIndexEntry records. Each element: Canonical author record: stable ID, name, affiliation, external identifiers, and enrichment history.

AffiliationHistoryEntry.description: A previous affiliation with date, tracking institution moves.

source.description: Enrichment source that set this affiliation, e.g. 'dblp', 'openalex', 'manual'.
source.title: Source

date.description: ISO 8601 date when this affiliation was recorded, e.g. '2025-01-15'.
date.title: Date

AffiliationHistoryEntry.title: AffiliationHistoryEntry

dblp_pid.description: DBLP person identifier, e.g. 'homepages/c/HaiboChen0001'. Used to link to DBLP author pages.
dblp_pid.title: Dblp Pid

openalex_id.description: OpenAlex author ID, e.g. 'A1234567890'. Used for citation lookups.
openalex_id.title: Openalex Id

AuthorIndexEntry.description: Canonical author record: stable ID, name, affiliation, external identifiers, and enrichment history.

id.description: Stable integer identifier (starts at 1). Assigned once and never reused or changed across pipeline runs.
id.title: Id

name.description: Full name in DBLP format. Includes disambiguation suffix when present (e.g., 'Haibo Chen 0001'). Unique across all authors.
name.title: Name

display_name.description: Human-readable name without DBLP disambiguation suffix, e.g. 'Haibo Chen' (from 'Haibo Chen 0001').
display_name.title: Display Name

affiliation.description: Normalized institution affiliation, e.g. 'Shanghai Jiao Tong University'. Empty string if unknown.
affiliation.title: Affiliation

affiliation_source.description: Which enrichment layer last set the affiliation: 'dblp', 'openalex', or 'manual'. Empty if never set.
affiliation_source.title: Affiliation Source

affiliation_updated.description: ISO 8601 date when affiliation was last updated, e.g. '2026-04-07'. Empty string if never updated.
affiliation_updated.title: Affiliation Updated

affiliation_history.description: Previous affiliations with dates, tracking institution moves. Most recent first.
affiliation_history.title: Affiliation History

external_ids.description: Optional identifiers from external databases (DBLP, ORCID, OpenAlex). Empty dict if none known.

category.description: Primary research area: 'systems', 'security', or 'both'. Based on conferences published at.
category.title: Category

AuthorIndexEntry.title: AuthorIndexEntry
